name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash Memphis, Tennessee — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day or...
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a storefront lender operating multiple locations across Tennessee and other states, providing short-term personal loans and financial services. The company positions itself as a neighborhood lending solution with the tagline "Tomorrow can be payday®" and emphasizes in-store customer service for loan applications and approvals.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due around the next paycheck), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw capabilities), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral). Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary financial services including money orders, wire transfers, check cashing, and Green Dot Visa debit card services at most retail locations.

Specific to Speedy Cash is their emphasis on transparent in-store counseling before application—the website explicitly states customers will "know exactly how much it costs to borrow" prior to signing. The Memphis location operates extended hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday, 9am-6pm Tuesday-Thursday, 9am-4pm Saturday, closed Sunday) and maintains both in-store and online application options. The company operates multiple Tennessee locations and serves neighboring states.

However, Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost lending sector with products typically carrying triple-digit APRs—characteristic of payday and title loans. While the website emphasizes clarity and customer service, these remain emergency short-term products not suitable for sustained borrowing. The company is not a payday-alternative provider with rate caps, and title loans create collateral risk for vehicle owners.
pros: Payday loans available up to $425 with next-paycheck repayment timeline, providing clarity on exact borrowing cost before signing
Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw-as-needed structure and credit limit restoration as payments are made
Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral for larger emergency cash needs
Multiple Tennessee locations (9+ Memphis-area stores listed) with extended weekday hours (9am-7pm on Monday/Friday)
In-store loan counseling allowing applicants to ask questions throughout application before commitment
Additional money services (wire transfers, check cashing, money orders, Green Dot cards) available at most locations
Bilingual customer service available (English 1-888-333-1360 and Spanish 1-855-734-0111)
cons: Payday and title loans typically carry triple-digit APRs, making them expensive emergency solutions with high rollover risk
Title loans create collateral risk—borrowers can lose their vehicle if unable to repay on the specified timeline
Website provides no APR, fee, or interest rate disclosures, preventing comparison shopping before entering the store
Short repayment terms (payday loans due next paycheck) create cash flow strain for borrowers living paycheck-to-paycheck
No mention of alternative repayment plans or hardship provisions if borrower cannot repay on schedule
best_for: Consumers with immediate emergency cash needs ($100-$425) who can repay within one paycheck cycle
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 and willing to pledge car title as collateral for larger loan amounts
Borrowers who prefer in-person application and counseling over online-only lenders, or lack digital access
Customers needing secondary financial services (check cashing, wire transfers) in addition to emergency loans
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies under $425 (payday loans) or $1,000-$4,000 (title/line of credit) who can repay within the loan term and have access to physical retail locations in Tennessee. The critical caveat: these high-cost emergency products carry triple-digit APRs and short repayment windows that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; they should only be used as last resort for genuine emergencies, not recurring cash flow gaps. No rate information is disclosed online, requiring in-store visit to understand true borrowing costs.
services: Vehicle appraisal for title loan qualification
